description: render the Observe projection of the current research state (read-only)
rules: read-only — never mutates the tree or run config
prints objective, global insights, active frontier, executed/merged evidence, pruned constraints, current best
the coordinator re-grounds on this projection at the start of each cycle
usage: Set RECORD_STORE pointing at an existing Arbor run (created by the init perk). Output: observe.txt. If no run exists in the store, an empty bootstrap run is created so the projection has a tree to read.
limitation: Read-only projection only — it interprets nothing and makes no decisions. Requires the .arbor/ state to exist (or it bootstraps an empty one).
